name: NeoImmuneTech, Inc.
summary: NeoImmuneTech, Inc., a clinical-stage T cell-focused biotech company, engages in the discovery and development of novel immuno-therapeutics in the United States. It is developing NT-I7, a clinical-stage long-acting human IL-7 for oncologic and immunologic indications. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Rockville, Maryland.
